# discord_server (Data Source)

Fetches information about a Discord server (guild).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the server.

### Read-Only

- `default_message_notifications` (Number) Default message notification level.
- `explicit_content_filter` (Number) Explicit content filter level.
- `member_count` (Number) Approximate number of members in the server.
- `name` (String) The name of the server.
- `owner_id` (String) ID of the owner of the server.
- `region` (String) Voice region ID for the server.
- `verification_level` (Number) Verification level required for the server.
